Title IX: A Programmer's Perspective

Fantastic Preys and Where to Find Them

Over-simplified, unstructured, ego, not yet scientific

Website code is GPT heavy, but contents are GPT free

Abstract

This work attempts to analyze the sexual assualt topic together with my own victim experience under the computational perspective.

Highlighted contributions are

  • Introducing cultural arbitraging under sexual assult context.
  • Propose HCI (human computer interaction) ideas for SA prevention and advocacy.
  • Statistic modeling on some SA scenarios.
  • Some analogy, such as bug, coalescing STEM and psychological, social intuitions.

    • Index

    • About the title and domain name
    • Cultural Arbitraging: an informal survey in terms of Chinese educational cycle #digital_humanity #text_mining #opinion_mining
      • Timeline of influentical events about sexual assult, especially in East Asia and/or educational environment #data_visualization
      • Bride hunting (选妃) cultures in Chinese international student community. Proved true.
      • A guaranteed path to graduate school (保研路). A myth among Chinese college students that the instituions often give a grad school ofter as mouth-shutting compensate.
      • Unnecessary helps as lures: between the gap of decoupling of how everyday life and study works. Degree of coworks cultural gap.
      • Following Yanjie Bian's theory on Chinese society. That people often believe that 'strong private connections' work as social capital, instead of 'weak professional connection'.
      • 文化大革命，矫枉过正的举报恐惧. Private
      • References
    • Modeling networks how many prepatrators on the reported victim number 23%: 260-560. Are they all reported?
    • On Terrence Tao's blue eye puzzle. Cascading behavior. Why researches, rules, common sense are always late and why we need them. #networks #cascading_behavior
    • Cycle of sexual assult.
    • Random Linguistic, computational intuitions.
      • Baysian approach
      • Threats are always non-credible, but believing are always threatening
      • Dog whistling.
      • intuitionistic logic on psychological extreme. If it seems not ,it. Unless you believe. Evidence
      • Vulnerable bugs and how they might be programmed by the abuser or early envs.
      • experience as evidence. evidence as evidence
      • proof of always exists
      • misinformation
      • Cornell as a Galapagos
    • Random social side intuitions.
      • misinformation
    • Proposals on SA prevention with computational methods #hci #cscw
      • Using GenAI to moderate SA reporting, hearning and education process.
          Generate text image to visualized
      • Using GenAI to moderate SA reporting, hearning and education process.

    About the Title and Domain Name

    The title "Title IX: A Programmer's Perspective - Fantastic Preys and Where to Find Them", and the domain name of the site "debug your equality" draws inspiration from notable references:

    • Computer Systems: A Programmer's Perspective: This textbook is one of the most popular textboks among computer science students.
    • Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them: The 2016 movie about exploring magical creatures, paralleling our analysis on why 'fantastic preys' are vulnerable.
    • Debugging: Grace Hopper was the first woman programmer who first coined the term "bug" for computer system flaw, paralleling sexual assults and underlined incentives are the 'bugs' of peronal well-being and overall equality of our world, from a tech women's perspective.

    These themes highlight the intersection of technology, ethics, and education.

    On Terrence Tao's blue-eye island puzzle: why broadcasting and discussion are important; why some are responding late;

    The blue-eyed island puzzle was proposed by Terrence Tao. The key of the puzzle is the domino effect of "knowing everyone knows". Why the foreign story teller can make a difference. The key is 'common knowledge' which is crutial in game theory setting that 'everyone knows that everyone knows it'.

    How is it related to social setting of sexual assult? - Discussing and/or broadcasting makes difference. - The hazing number serves as a story teller. - Researches are late but we still need them. What I am proposing using this metaphor: - Some claims are oversimplified, ego, hyperat, not falsifiable, not scientific, are actually true but at the state before the story teller. - Social norms are quite local. They all have the information but not actually rendered. - There's lag in the cascading of 'suicide' during which arbitrage can happen. - Abstraction of 'all know' - A strong education on what's right or wrong, and acknowledge the time window, some 'bad' are bad, not your fault. - Suicide are story teller. - Information and belief.

    On Development

    • Q: Why unordered lists(i.e. bullet points instead of numerical section numbers) for all the lists this page? A: This page is updating. Ordinal bullet points subject to change may gasligh.
    • Q: What's the incentive for writing this? A: Short answer: Pain. Long Answer:
      • From months ago, social media discussions raised awareness for but also triggerred me badly. Going back to Cornell's site
    • Q: Courses, researches and learning at Cornell inspired this work? A:
      • AEM 4190 Strategic Thinking, for game theory incentives especially on family settings
      • ORIE 6350 Game Theory and Mechanism Design, for rigorous math proofs, non-credible threat, mechanism design
      • INFO 6530, 3300 and RAship with INFO facaulty, for text mining, data visualization, human computer interaction, computer mediated communication and computational research on social topics
      • ORIE 3120 for data analysis, workflow simulation
      • CS 6180 for intuitionistic logic
      • CS 6850, 4820 for network theory
      • CS 2800 and TAship for this nerdy way of thinking
    • Q: What happened during at Cornell?
    • Q: What happened these years?
    • Q: What are my factors to be a fantastic prey? A: Well, harsh question but I did go through them:
      • Q: What are the bugs?
      • Q: Why aren't those reported timely? A: That's why I have to write this, or the hurt would be non-terminating. Don't let this happen again. Or just make this happen less.
      • Q: Anyone else involved in this work? A: Not yet. Nor did I distribute the work to others although the domain is publicly available, i.e. can be cited.
      • Q: What to expect from the readers? A: The most desired things is professional critique and/or discussion on this work. Still, like a baby begging for mom's attention. Research collaboration will be surprisingly great.

      Cultural Arbitraging

      Section Intro

      The financial concept arbitraging, "buy low in one market" analouges scenarios where a prepatrator take advantage of definition gap of sexual assults, time window of information vacuum, social context difference, language gap, nostagia, uncertainty, etc. I provided pseudo-theoretical analysis and included discussion in Chinese social media.

      Key Events

      Year,Reported Brief Year,Event Prepatrator identity Age of prepatrator(event) Age of victim(event) Charge of prepatrator Notice about victim Opinion
      2025 dfa fdafldsajlkf djalf Maria Anders Germany Germany Germany Germany Germany Germany
      Centro comercial Moctezuma Francisco Chang Mexico Mexico Mexico Mexico Mexico Mexico Mexico
